assertion.value: M.N. and S.-W.H. are inventors of a provisional patent application (application number 63/651,520, United States), filed by the University of Colorado Boulder, about reconfigurable Brillouin lasers and Brillouin-quadratic lasers and frequency combs approach. The other authors declare no competing interests.
